code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_space(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn byte_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        let b = byte_at(s, i)
        if is_space(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      let first = byte_at(s, i)
      if first == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if first == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          let b = byte_at(s, i)
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn find_and_print(_ nums: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> Unit
  let n = nums.len()
  mut found = false
  mut fi = 0
  mut fj = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n and not found
    mut j = i + 1
    while j < n and not found
      let a = get_or_zero(nums, i)
      let b = get_or_zero(nums, j)
      if a + b == t
        found = true
        fi = i
        fj = j
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found
    print("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
  else
    print("none")
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    let nums = parse_ints(line1)
    let ts = parse_ints(line2)
    match ts.get(0)
    when Some(t)
      find_and_print(nums, t)
    when None
      print("none")
    end
  when None
    print("none")
  end
when None
  print("none")
end
